Free
The most intuitive
customer support platform
Help Scout brings context, collaboration, and AI inside the flow of support, so your team can make fast, exceptional service the standard.
Start for Free
Get a Demo
Clarity where it counts
Insights live alongside every conversation, so you can make the right call in real time.
Built for real teamwork
Teams on Help Scout respond to 56% more messages in their first year.
AI that multiplies your team
Take on more volume with AI agents that resolve 73% of interactions on average.
Help Scout is by far the best support product I have ever used.
Lindsay Cohen
Chief Operating Officer
One home for all your support conversations
Reply in seconds
Make it personal
Prioritize with ease
Click for sound
Click for sound
Click for sound
Plus, all the little things support teams love
Get a boost from AI
Recap long threads, edit and translate replies, or even create a first draft, all with a click.
Company management
Get the context you need to support full accounts, not just individuals.
Click for sound
Snooze
No rush to reply? Resurface the conversation at a later date automatically with snooze.
Send later
Schedule a reply so the customer gets it at the perfect time.
Workflows
Automate the tedious but critical tasks that keep your team (and Inbox) organized.
Saved replies
Add proven answers to common questions or situations with a few clicks.
Multiple Inboxes
Give every department or product its own dedicated place for support.
Channels
Close those extra tabs and handle messages from social, Shopify, and more in Help Scout.
Meet Beacon: your embeddable support hub
Answer instantly with AI
Customers can chat their way to fast solutions from your help content 24/7 — even for complex questions!
Keep human help within reach
Whether you offer live chat, email, or both, your team will always be within two clicks.
Save customers time
Allow easy access to previous conversations so customers can pick up where they left off.
Get closer to customers with in-app messages
Welcome and onboard
Help customers start strong with a friendly nudge toward your best resources.
Gather feedback and NPS®
Understand how customers feel in context. Use NPS or pick from our library of surveys to get a read on specific experiences.
Share what’s new
Use modals and banners in-app or on your website to get attention on promos, new features, and important updates.
Reporting that tells a story
“What’s our volume across channels?”
Understand the “why” behind your volume so you can make the right adjustments.
“How’s our response time?”
Measure your team’s activity in the queue and get a sense of the factors contributing to wait times.
“Where can we improve?”
Get a bird’s eye view of support team performance, both as a whole and individually.
Stay organized automatically
Assign the right person for the job
Make sure messages for sales actually get to sales the first time, no redirecting necessary.
Never miss important messages
Whether you want to resurface urgent conversations or flag refund requests, workflows do it for you so no one slips through the cracks.
Simplify the queue for your team
Help everyone get more efficient with custom Views that group conversations.
100+ powerful integrations
Help Scout slides right in with your favorite tools, so you can keep working your way.
Why do 12,000+ companies choose Help Scout?
World-class support
Our team answers 99% of emails within 24 hours, so you’re never left in the dark.
Ease of use
Independent research showed that our NPS is 7x higher than competitors’ scores.
Built to scale
80% of customers are still here after 4 years, so you can be confident you won’t outgrow us.
Start for Free
Learn the platform in less than an hour.
Become a
power user
in less than a day.
Start for Free

FAQ
Can I add more Inboxes or Docs sites to my plan?
Yes — additional Inboxes beyond the number included in your plan are available for $10 per month when paid annually (or $12 per month). Additional Docs sites are available for $20 per month when paid annually (or $24 per month). The Free plan is limited to just 1 Inbox and 1 Docs site.
What counts as an AI resolution?
A resolution is a single conversation that is resolved by AI Answers without human assistance.
A resolution is counted only if the customer receives an AI response and doesn’t use escalation, search the knowledge base, ask more questions, or indicate that they need more help.
If a customer requests more help with natural language or by selecting the “I still need help” button, the conversation won’t count as a resolution and you won’t be charged.
You'll only be charged for one resolution per conversation, even if AI Answers responds to multiple questions.
Can I set caps on AI resolution spending?
Yes — you can set a monthly cap on AI Answers resolutions. If you hit your spending cap, AI Answers will be disabled automatically for the remainder of the monthly cycle. You’ll receive email notifications as you get closer to your cap.
This option allows for predictable billing, so you’ll never be surprised at the end of the month.
How does the free trial work?
When you sign up for a free trial of the Standard or Plus plan, you’ll get 15 days to take all of the plan’s features for a test drive — no credit card required. Want to trial the Pro plan?
Talk to our sales team
.
How does the 3-month AI Answers trial work?
When you create your Help Scout account, you will get 3 months of free, unlimited AI Answers resolutions. This gives you plenty of time to test it and measure the impact without having to pay for resolutions. The trial starts on the first day you create your account.
What payment methods does Help Scout accept?
We accept major credit cards, including Visa, American Express, Mastercard, and Discover. For some annual payments, wire or ACH transfer is also available. Free accounts don’t need to add a payment method.
Do you offer discounts for startups or non-profits?
The Help Scout for Good program
offers discounts for qualifying non-profits and B Corporations. We also have a startup plan designed to accommodate early-stage companies.
Check it out
to see if you qualify.

analysis.name: Help Scout
analysis.tagline: The most intuitive customer support platform
analysis.value_proposition: A shared inbox platform that combines email, live chat, and AI to help growing support teams respond faster and resolve more requests without adding headcount.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing SaaS and e-commerce teams with 5–50 support reps who need a clean, collaborative inbox with AI-assisted resolution at an accessible price point

features.name: shared inbox
features.description: Collaborative workspace for teams to manage and reply to customer conversations
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate on customer conversations in a shared workspace.

features.name: multiple inboxes
features.description: Separate inboxes per department or product; additional inboxes purchasable at $10/mo each
features.evidence_quote: Maximums by plan: Free (1), Standard (20), Plus (50), Pro (unlimited).

features.name: email management
features.description: Manage customer emails as a team from a shared queue with forwarding and routing
features.evidence_quote: Manage customer emails as a team.

features.name: live chat
features.description: Offer live chat anywhere on your website or in-app via Beacon widget
features.evidence_quote: Offer live chat anywhere on your website or in-app.

features.name: ai inbox assistant
features.description: In-inbox AI tools for drafting, editing, translating, and recapping conversations
features.evidence_quote: AI Inbox assistant

features.name: ai answers
features.description: Autonomous AI agent that resolves customer questions instantly using your help content, billed per resolution
features.evidence_quote: Scale capacity with an AI assistant that instantly resolves customer requests. Pay per resolution.

features.name: ai draft replies
features.description: AI-generated first draft replies for agents to review, edit, and send
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited AI Drafts

features.name: ai thread recap
features.description: One-click AI summary of long conversation threads to get agents up to speed
features.evidence_quote: Recap long threads, edit and translate replies, or even create a first draft, all with a click.

features.name: ai translation
features.description: AI-powered translation of replies for multilingual customer support
features.evidence_quote: Recap long threads, edit and translate replies, or even create a first draft, all with a click.

features.name: beacon
features.description: Embeddable website/app widget combining chat, help docs access, and proactive messaging
features.evidence_quote: Meet Beacon: your embeddable support hub

features.name: knowledge base / docs
features.description: Self-service help center with articles, categories, collections, and full-text search
features.evidence_quote: Multiple knowledge bases

features.name: multiple knowledge bases
features.description: Run separate Docs sites for different products, brands, or audiences
features.evidence_quote: Multiple knowledge bases

features.name: custom domain (docs)
features.description: Host your Docs/knowledge base on a custom domain
features.evidence_quote: Using a custom domain, sorting content, and managing multiple sites

features.name: workflows
features.description: Rule-based automations to auto-assign, tag, and organize conversations
features.evidence_quote: Automate the tedious but critical tasks that keep your team (and Inbox) organized.

features.name: saved replies
features.description: Library of pre-written FAQ responses searchable and insertable in two clicks
features.evidence_quote: Create a library of FAQ responses you can search and insert in 2 clicks.

features.name: tags
features.description: Labels on conversations for trend monitoring and automation triggers
features.evidence_quote: Use tags to label conversations, monitor trends, and start automations.

features.name: snooze
features.description: Defer a conversation and automatically resurface it at a scheduled date/time
features.evidence_quote: Use snooze to set a date and time for a conversation to return to the top of your Inbox.

features.name: send later
features.description: Schedule email replies to be delivered at a specified future time
features.evidence_quote: Schedule emails to arrive exactly when you want with send later.

features.name: views
features.description: Custom filtered conversation lists grouped by status, assignment, priority, or any criteria
features.evidence_quote: Groups conversations into lists based on criteria like status, assignments, and priority.

features.name: customer profiles
features.description: Auto-populated sidebar with customer data and full conversation history alongside every ticket
features.evidence_quote: View customer data and conversation history in an auto-populated and editable sidebar.

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Up to 10 custom data points per conversation for reporting and workflow conditions
features.evidence_quote: Track up to 10 custom data points on each conversation for use in reporting and workflows.

features.name: customer properties
features.description: Up to 50 additional custom data fields stored per customer profile
features.evidence_quote: Collect and display up to 50 additional customer data points that matter to your team.

features.name: company management
features.description: Group contacts and conversations by company to view full account-level context
features.evidence_quote: Organize contacts and conversations by company to get a clear picture of the whole account.

features.name: round robin routing
features.description: Automatically distribute incoming conversations evenly across available agents
features.evidence_quote: Round robin routing

features.name: load balanced routing
features.description: Route conversations based on current agent workload rather than simple round-robin
features.evidence_quote: Round robin + load balanced

features.name: sla policies
features.description: Configurable service level agreement targets for response and resolution times
features.evidence_quote: One basic SLA policy

features.name: facebook messenger integration
features.description: Receive and reply to Facebook Messenger conversations inside Help Scout inbox
features.evidence_quote: Handle customer conversations through Facebook Messenger.

features.name: instagram integration
features.description: Receive and reply to Instagram DMs inside Help Scout inbox
features.evidence_quote: Handle customer conversations through Instagram.

features.name: whatsapp messaging
features.description: Handle customer conversations through WhatsApp in the shared inbox
features.evidence_quote: WhatsApp messaging

features.name: nps surveys
features.description: Send NPS and targeted satisfaction surveys to customers via Beacon in context
features.evidence_quote: Gather feedback and NPS® — Understand how customers feel in context.

features.name: proactive in-app messages
features.description: Target customers with modals and banners in-app or on website for announcements, promos, or onboarding
features.evidence_quote: Use modals and banners in-app or on your website to get attention on promos, new features.

features.name: onboarding messages
features.description: Welcome new users with guided nudges toward key resources via Beacon
features.evidence_quote: Help customers start strong with a friendly nudge toward your best resources.

features.name: previous conversations in beacon
features.description: Customers can access their prior conversation history directly from the Beacon widget
features.evidence_quote: Allow easy access to previous conversations so customers can pick up where they left off.

features.name: reporting and analytics
features.description: Reports on volume, response time, and individual/team performance across channels
features.evidence_quote: Get a bird's eye view of support team performance, both as a whole and individually.

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps for managing support conversations on mobile devices
features.evidence_quote: Work in your Inbox from iOS or Android devices in mobile apps

features.name: light users
features.description: Collaborator seat type that can view and comment without consuming a full paid seat
features.evidence_quote: Let teammates view conversations and collaborate without taking up a full user seat.

features.name: teams
features.description: User groups for routing assignments and team-level reporting
features.evidence_quote: Assign conversations and monitor reports based on a group of users.

features.name: advanced permissions
features.description: Granular access control at company, team, or individual user level
features.evidence_quote: Control visibility and access at the company, team, or user level.

features.name: sso/saml
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise identity provider integration
features.evidence_quote: SSO/SAML

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant configuration available for healthcare customers
features.evidence_quote: HIPAA compliance

features.name: two-factor authentication
features.description: 2FA support for account security
features.evidence_quote: Manage account wide settings like permissions, 2FA, SSO, content filtering, and more

features.name: content filtering
features.description: Account-level content filtering settings for inbox management
features.evidence_quote: Manage account wide settings like permissions, 2FA, SSO, content filtering, and more

features.name: conversation merging
features.description: Merge duplicate conversations from the same customer into a single thread
features.evidence_quote: Reply to conversations, forward emails, merge duplicates, and more

features.name: shopify integration
features.description: Surface Shopify order and customer data inside conversations
features.evidence_quote: handle messages from social, Shopify, and more in Help Scout

features.name: woocommerce integration
features.description: Connect WooCommerce store data for ecommerce support context
features.evidence_quote: Connect to ecommerce apps like Shopify, WooCommerce, and more

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Sync Salesforce CRM data with Help Scout conversations and customer profiles
features.evidence_quote: Salesforce, Jira, and HubSpot

features.name: hubspot integration
features.description: Sync HubSpot CRM and marketing data with Help Scout
features.evidence_quote: Salesforce, Jira, and HubSpot

features.name: jira integration
features.description: Link Jira issues to support conversations for engineering escalation workflows
features.evidence_quote: Salesforce, Jira, and HubSpot

features.name: aircall integration
features.description: Voice/phone channel integration with preferred pricing for Pro plan customers
features.evidence_quote: Preferred pricing on Aircall

features.name: api and custom apps
features.description: Public API and app framework for building custom integrations and internal tools
features.evidence_quote: Build custom apps and integrations using Help Scout's API and apps tools

features.name: dedicated onboarding specialist
features.description: Named onboarding specialist assigned to help Pro teams get up and running
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated onboarding specialist

features.name: strategic account manager
features.description: Named account manager for ongoing strategic support on the Pro plan
features.evidence_quote: Strategic account manager

features.name: contacts management
features.description: Unified contact records tracking every person who has interacted with your team
features.evidence_quote: Someone who received a reply from your team or had their question resolved by the AI assistant.

features.name: partner program
features.description: Reseller and referral partner program for agencies and consultants
features.evidence_quote: Partner Program — Grow your business with Help Scout

differentiators: NPS 7x higher than competitors per independent research
Teams respond to 56% more messages in their first year on average
AI Answers autonomous agent resolves 73% of interactions on average
Support team responds to 99% of customer emails within 24 hours
80% of customers still active after 4 years
Usage-based AI agent pricing ($0.75/resolution) instead of seat-based AI charges
3-month free trial on AI Answers add-on
HIPAA compliance available without moving to custom enterprise contract

recent_ships.what: AI Answers autonomous agent add-on launched at $0.75/resolution with 3-month free trial and pre-paid discount options
recent_ships.source: Scale capacity with an AI assistant that instantly resolves customer requests. Pay per resolution on a monthly basis.
Help Scout Welcomes Toby Gabriner as Chief Executive Officer

praised: Help Scout is by far the best support product I have ever used. — Lindsay Cohen, COO (landing page testimonial)
Cited alongside Basecamp and Trello as part of quality remote-team tool stacks (HN discussion)
Claimed NPS 7x higher than competitors based on independent research
complaints: No G2 review data available from the provided sources (g2.com returned no extractable content)
No direct user complaint quotes available from the provided sources

free_tier.limits: 5 users, 1 inbox, 1 docs site, 100 contacts/mo, 10 saved replies, 10 tags

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users, 1 inbox, 1 docs site, email, 100 contacts/mo, 10 saved replies, 10 tags

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25 users, 20 inboxes, live chat, Instagram, Messenger, 1 basic SLA, basic workflows, AI inbox assistant

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50 users, WhatsApp, advanced workflows, 2 advanced SLAs, unlimited AI drafts, Salesforce/Jira/HubSpot, round robin routing

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited users (min 10), SSO/SAML, HIPAA, unlimited SLAs/workflows, 50 light users, dedicated onboarding + account manager

tiers.name: AI Answers (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Autonomous AI resolution agent; $0.75/resolution, 3-month free trial, pre-paid discounts available

pricing.notes: Additional inboxes cost $10/mo each on Standard/Plus/Pro beyond plan-included counts. AI Answers is a usage-based add-on ($0.75/resolution) available across paid plans; also listed as included in Pro but billing mechanism unclear from source. Pro requires minimum 10 users. Annual billing saves approximately 16%. Free tier capped at 100 contacts/month. Light users: 5 included on Plus (max 25), 15 included on Pro (max 50).
